name: com.pulsemcp/dynamodb
description: MCP server for AWS DynamoDB with fine-grained tool control and configurable access levels.

environmentVariables.name: AWS_REGION
environmentVariables.description: AWS region for DynamoDB (or use AWS_DEFAULT_REGION).

environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: AWS access key ID (uses AWS credential chain if not set).

environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AWS secret access key (uses AWS credential chain if not set).

environmentVariables.name: DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: Custom endpoint for local DynamoDB or LocalStack.

environmentVariables.name: DYNAMODB_ENABLED_TOOL_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool groups to enable (readonly, readwrite, admin).

environmentVariables.name: DYNAMODB_ENABLED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated whitelist of specific tools to enable.

environmentVariables.name: DYNAMODB_DISABLED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated blacklist of specific tools to disable.

environmentVariables.name: DYNAMODB_ALLOWED_TABLES
environmentVariables.description: Restrict operations to specific tables (comma-separated); all tables accessible if not set.
